subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: Evil does not exist. Death is only the lack of life; therefore death does not exist. Darkness is only the lack of light.
subcodes.subjects: @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @being a source of light; guidance, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @light and darkness
